schedules.name: Ralph Work Monitor
schedules.description: Polls open issues every 5 minutes, triages new work, and assigns to agents.

schedules.name: Nightly Context Cleanup
schedules.description: Runs 'squad nap --deep' at 2 AM to compress histories and archive stale decisions.

schedules.name: Session Startup Sync
schedules.description: Runs once on squad init — pulls upstream changes and refreshes casting registry.

task.command: squad upstream sync && squad cast refresh

schedules.name: Weekly Status Report
schedules.description: Generates a weekly summary of completed work, open blockers, and metrics.
